## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Galileo and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance updates, and new initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Sessions bounced back from last week's low; LLM referrals increased past 200](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [New content initiatives planned: research paper reviews, model/framework comparison pages, competitor landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Focus on cross-pollinating content across blog, video, and social media channels](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Need for more detailed ICP data and internal benchmarks to enhance content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=228.0)

## Topics

### Performance Update

  - [Sessions recovered from previous week's dip, likely due to seasonal fluctuations](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [AI overview presence increased to 106 block pages with 62,000+ combined keyword volume](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [LLM referrals exceeded 200, with metrics category as the biggest driver](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Overall performance in a "holding pattern," expecting growth from queued articles and expanding topic clusters](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)

### Content Strategy Evolution

  - [Exploring new content ideas adapting to different frameworks](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Goal: Double current weekly views (1,200) through strategic content expansion](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Focus on emerging field of generative SEO (GEO)](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Cross-pollination of content across platforms (blog, video, podcast)](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Targeting four main personas: developer, AI leader, data scientist, AI-enabled product manager](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=863.0)

### New Content Initiatives

1.  Research Paper Reviews
    
      - [50+ papers listed in Airtable, focusing on 2020 onwards](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
      - [Plan to publish weekly reviews with SME input](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
      - [Create video content: either LM-generated or SME-led presentations](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=1068.0)
      - [Promote on LinkedIn, tagging researchers for engagement](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)

2.  Model/Framework Comparison Pages
    
      - [Create programmatically generated pages for model overviews, comparisons, and alternatives](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)
      - [Develop a "model hub" in resources section to boost SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)
      - [Integrate CTAs for Galileo's agent leaderboard, Luna 2 small language models, and free product](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)

3.  Competitor Landing Pages
    
      - [Develop versus competitor articles/landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=1695.0)
      - [Initially use publicly available data, with potential to incorporate internal data later](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=1766.0)
      - [Prepare for future Google Ads campaigns targeting competitor brand names](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)

### Content Production and Review

  - [31 articles awaiting review from Galileo team](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Team members urged to allocate time for content review](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)

### Operational Updates

  - [New web developer resource available for implementing programmatic pages](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)
  - [Design resources constrained due to upcoming product launches](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)
  - [Potential 2-3 week timeline for new page implementations](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=1864.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vivek to send out meeting summary and action items](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
  - [GrowthX to create templates for new page types (model comparisons, competitor pages)](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=1873.0)
  - [Galileo team to review pending articles (30 minutes per team member)](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=1906.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up call to discuss competitor page strategy and internal data usage](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
  - [Galileo to provide updated ICP data and messaging in the next 1-2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=909.0)
  - [Explore integration of internal benchmarks and agent use case data for content](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=1657.0)
  - [Begin implementation of research paper review process, starting with shared examples](https://fathom.video/share/zJW8Jx1mLhUiZ1FLBixMxkAdXsy9YqPo?tab=summary&timestamp=1149.0)
